Attributes.Description: Name of the airline representing its unique identity.
Unique callsign used to identify the airline during radio communications.
Country where the airline is based or registered.
Operational status of the airline, indicating whether it is active or inactive.
Name of the airport or facility serving travelers and cargo.
City where the airport is located.
Country where the airport is located.
Geographical coordinate indicating the north-south position of the airport.
Geographical coordinate indicating the east-west position of the airport.
Height of the airport above sea level, measured in feet.
Name of the airline operating the route.
Name of the airport where the flight commences.
Name of the airport where the flight terminates.
